ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each product for easy reference */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "dosage_form" TEXT /* Dosage form of the product */,
  "first_line_designation" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is a first-line designation */,
  "sub_classification" TEXT /* Sub-classification of the product */,
  "dosage" REAL /* Dosage of the product */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the dosage */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was approved for distribution */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the product expires */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently active */,
  "regulatory_status" TEXT /* Status of the product in terms of regulatory compliance */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions required for storing the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_name FOREIGN KEY ("brand_name") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_sub_classification FOREIGN KEY ("sub_classification") REFERENCES sub_classifications ("sub_classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_dosage_form FOREIGN KEY ("dosage_form") REFERENCES dosage_forms ("dosage_form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dosage_forms" (
  "dosage_form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dosage form */,
  "dosage_form_name" TEXT /* Name of the dosage form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dosage_form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_classifications" (
  "sub_classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-classification */,
  "sub_classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "regulatory_authority" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory authority in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being shipped */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country receiving the shipment */,
  "shipment_mode" TEXT /* Mode of shipment (e.g., Air, Ocean, Air Charter) */,
  "freight_cost" REAL /* Cost of freight for the shipment */,
  "shipping_price" REAL /* Price of shipping */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the shipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "insurance_cost" REAL /* Cost of insurance for the shipment */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the shipment */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the shipment */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_shipment_mode FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_mode") REFERENCES shipment_modes ("shipment_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_modes" (
  "shipment_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment mode */,
  "shipment_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipment mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., logistics manager, product manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_shipment" (
  "product_shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-shipment association */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_shipment_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_shipment_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
